shellcheck.note: Even though ShellCheck does warn that "Use "${var:?}" to ensure this never expands to /* .," it does not specifically warn about deleting files in the root directory.
Even though ShellCheck suggests to "Use 'cd ... || exit' or 'cd ... || return' in case cd fails.," it does not detect that the arguments to `cd` are too many.
ShellCheck detects and suggests to "Double quote to prevent globbing and word splitting."
ShellCheck detects and warns about the erroneous use `//` that intends to writing comment but instead triggers `//` being interpreted as a command.
